name: [BUG-DB-008] TC-DB-008 — monthly-revenue: invalid year values accepted without 400
description:
**[BUG-DB-008]**

The `/dashboard/monthly-revenue` endpoint accepts invalid year values without returning 400:

| Input | Expected | Actual |
|-------|----------|--------|
| year=0 | 400 | 200 (defaults to current year) |
| year= (empty) | 400 | 200 (defaults to current year) |
| year=9999 | 400 or 200 with empty data | 200 |
| year=abc | 400 | ? |

**Expected:** Reject years outside a sensible range (e.g. 2000–2099) with 400 Bad Request.
